title: Fix discount double-apply bug in calculateTotal
fail_to_pass: coupon reduces price by correct percentage
pass_to_pass: returns subtotal when no coupon provided
problem_statement: The calculateTotal function in src/cart.ts is applying the discount twice when a coupon code is provided. A 10% coupon should reduce a $100 cart to $90, but the current implementation reduces it to $81. Fix the bug so the discount is applied exactly once.
